posts.author: magda (Magda)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I’ve heard that Monday.com can be integrated with Power BI, allowing data to be exported from Monday.comy.com to Power BI (e.g. for visualisation purposes).

However, I need to know if the reverse is possible - that is, can a portion of data be imported from Power BI to Monday.com (for project management purposes)?

Thanks,
Magda

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello@magda

welcome to the Community

I saw your query we can intergrated to monday to power BI and sync the data and export the all the data accoding to your requirement, and reverse is also possible , both side syne the data must required for automation, i will share you flow of the video how it work the process,

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello@magda

Connecting monday.com to Power BI with the Power BI Connector for monday.com. . It allows exporting a wide range of data, including Workspaces, Boards, Items, Teams, Users, Tags, Updates, and more, without requiring coding skills. This user-friendly connector offers comprehensive data access and supports unlimited tables and fields for data integration, advanced filtering options, dynamic Entity Relationship Diagrams (ERDs), and automated data extraction for up-to-date reports and dashboards.
